title: Implement Stage 2 single-view DUSt3R reconstruction
description: Create scripts/reconstruct/run_dust3r.py for buildings with only 1-2 photos. Use DUSt3R/MASt3R to generate single-view point clouds (.ply) to dust3r/ directory. Fallback path when COLMAP photogrammetry cannot run. Must respect GPU lock (.gpu_lock).
